texto: She knows about the music stuff, but she doesn't care. That's why I didn't tell her about my job at the studio. She doesn't want make me want to be better, like you do. She doesn't get that it's scary... to want something so much and not be sure if you're good enough.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brandy Colbert: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “She knows about the music stuff, but she doesn't care. That's why I didn't tell her about my job …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, ambition, doubt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de doubt e music.

frase_original: She knows about the music stuff, but she doesn't care. That's why I didn't tell her about my job at the studio. She doesn't want make me want to be better, like you do. She doesn't get that it's scary... to want something so much and not be sure if you're good enough.
